title: Mystical Oak Tree
description: Interactive and talking NPC-Like block with 300+ lines of lore, wisdom and facts
body:
## Mystical Oak Tree

Mystical Wise Tree, what is your wisdom?

- Mystical Oak Tree is an ancient immortal transcendental being that manifests himself in the shape of an ordinary oak tree

You might also notice its uncanny human resemblance, this is because he can engage in complex methaphyical conversation with the player  
To do so simply touch him

- Be wary tho as attacking the tree wont be a good idea as he can very well defend for himself. Infact how could have he lived for so long if he didnt?

- Once talked to the tree will bestow the player with all sorts of his knowledge such as random facts, words of wistom, trivia or even jokes.

To do so however you will first have to gain hist trust by talking with him for long enough.  
Negative actions will of course decrease his trust in you

- Pro tip: don't talk to him during the day as doing so will require you to wake him up and this will reduce his trust in you

- As for where you can find him there's not a good answer as he is the one that will find you but in general be on the lookout becaus this might very well happen in any overworld biome. You will notice him as he has a slightly different tree shape

- The mod includes **300+** custom written lines for him plus way more dynamically grabbed from the web. Talk with him every day and he'll always have something new to share!
- More precisely here are all the topics he knows:
    - Random facts
    - Tree jokes
    - Minecraft lore and trivia
    - Words of wisdon
    - Videogame quotes
    - Tips
    - Memes
    - Tomorrows weather
    - You

This mod was made for Spooky Jam 2022

https://twitter.com/i/status/1587151251300823040
